notes: v0.16.35 — Phase 8/9: BOSS finale + reward screen. BOSS node now launches a real duel against the rift's picked boss at the difficulty-mapped tier (BRUTAL rift = BRUTAL boss). Per-node rift bonuses stack on top of normal in-match XP/PULSE, scaled by rift difficulty (×1.0 / ×1.4 / ×1.9 / ×2.5). Boss clear adds +250 XP / +200 PULSE base × multiplier on top. BRUTAL clears drop +5 SURGE. New RIFT COMPLETE screen lists boss + difficulty, XP / PULSE / SURGE chips, every module secured, and a RETURN button. Windows only.
